domain: Sikh langar (Sikh communal kitchen tradition; same food in same pots; pangat egalitarian floor-row seating; status distinctions removed pre-meal so collective discussion emerges from a leveled-floor)
specific_mechanism: Pre-task uniform shared-context bootstrap leveling all agents' priors before egalitarian equal-vote consensus computation.
llm_application: LANGAR-CONSENSUS: pre-task uniform shared-context bootstrap for egalitarian multi-agent consensus. Before any role-specific reasoning, ALL agents receive an identical 'shared meal' context = a deterministic shared-fact summary computed at task-startup, AND have their role-priors zeroed (uniform initialisation). Each agent answers task-specific question independently using this leveled state; final consensus is computed by equal-vote (no confidence weighting). Differs from RECONCILE (confidence-weighted vote), MAD (hierarchical refinement), KAVA-CIRCLE-FB (tier-weighted), ILPAYIANI-CONSENSUS (age-weighted) by combining (a) UNIFORM PRE-TASK shared-meal context, (b) ROLE-PRIOR ZEROING, (c) EQUAL-VOTE-WEIGHT consensus.
novelty_claim: Context Learning for Multi-Agent Discussion 2602.02350 + AgentsNet + Consensus-LLM project already cover shared-context multi-agent consensus. LANGAR-CONSENSUS recombines uniform-context-bootstrap + role-prior-zero + equal-vote. Recombination.
